info.name: Galaxy Elite Private Match Backend API - Production
info.description:
Advanced Postman collection for the Galaxy Elite Private Match TypeScript Express backend.

Production base URL: `https://api.yourpropertymatch.cloud`.

Auth model:
- User routes use `Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}` captured from Register/Login.
- Admin routes use role JWT variables such as `{{adminToken}}`, `{{complianceToken}}`, or `{{superAdminToken}}`.
- Server-to-server admin smoke tests may use `x-internal-api-key: {{internalApiKey}}` if you set it from backend `.env`.

Run order suggestion:
1. System > Health Check
2. Auth > Register User
3. Auth > Login User
4. Profile > Me
5. Submissions / Upload / Verification examples
6. Admin routes after setting a privileged token or internal API key.

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body exists', function () {

request.description: Backend health, DB configured flag, engine, uptime.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Native JWT registration and login. Register/Login capture `userToken`, `userId`, and `userEmail` automatically.

request.description: Creates a native user account. Staff roles cannot self-register. Password must be at least 12 characters.

exec: pm.test('Auth response ok', function () { pm.expect(json.ok).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.token).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Logs in with `{{userEmail}}` and captures a fresh `userToken`.

exec: pm.test('Auth response ok', function () { pm.expect(json.ok).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.token).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Optional additional user example. Change email if already used.

item.name: Public Submissions
item.description: User-facing submission APIs. Interest and availability require Bearer user token.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Postman QA buyer interest - Dubai apartment",
  "availability_type": "Private matching only",
  "listing_intent": "Keep private - match only",
  "market_segment": "Residential",
  "property_type": "Apartment / flat",
  "country": "UAE",
  "area_city": "Dubai",
  "project_name": "Downtown Dubai",
  "building_name": "Any premium tower",
  "size_sqft": 1100,
  "price_min": 1000000,
  "price_max": 1600000,
  "availability_date": "2026-09-01",
  "privacy_level": "Admin only",
  "private_description": "Buyer wants a private apartment opportunity in Dubai with verified owner authority.",
  "category": "residential",
  "offering_type": "sell",
  "rooms": 3,
  "bedrooms": 2,
  "total_floors": 40,
  "parking_spaces": 1,
  "furnishing_type": "Furnished",
  "project_status": "ready to move",
  "amenities": [
    "Balcony",
    "security"
  ],
  "preferred_payment_method": "Cash",
  "user_role": "Buyer"
}

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('interestId', json.id); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('submissionId', json.id);

item.name: Taxonomy
item.description: Public taxonomy browsing and admin taxonomy management.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.item && json.item.id) pm.environment.set('taxonomyItemId', json.item.id);

item.name: Uploads And Verification
item.description: Private document signed URL creation and user identity verification submission.

item.name: Create Signed Upload URL - Owner ID

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('documentId', json.id); if (json.storagePath) pm.environment.set('storagePath', json.storagePath); if (json.signedUrl) pm.environment.set('signedUploadUrl', json.signedUrl);
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.status) pm.environment.set('verificationStatus', json.status);

item.name: Notifications
item.description: User notification listing and staff dispatch.

item.name: Matches And Rooms
item.description: Admin matching APIs and participant match-room APIs.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.match && json.match.id) pm.environment.set('matchRequestId', json.match.id);
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.room && json.room.id) pm.environment.set('matchRoomId', json.room.id);
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.room && json.room.id) pm.environment.set('matchRoomId', json.room.id);

item.name: Admin Submissions
item.description: Admin/compliance queue, details, and moderation actions.

item.name: Admin Documents And Identity
item.description: Compliance review queues, signed document viewing, document verification, and identity approval/rejection.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.signedUrl) pm.environment.set('signedViewUrl', json.signedUrl);
const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.rows && json.rows.length && json.rows[0].id) pm.environment.set('targetUserId', json.rows[0].id);
